codeReview.summary: Most mutation paths were moved from global cache clears to narrower invalidation helpers, but deleteHighlight leaves stale per-video highlight caches because it does not actually evict /api/videos/{videoId}/highlights entries when videoId is unknown.

issues.description: deleteHighlight() calls invalidateHighlightCache() without videoId, but invalidateHighlightCache only evicts per-video highlights when videoId is provided. This leaves cached /api/videos/{videoId}/highlights responses stale after a delete until TTL expiry, violating targeted invalidation correctness for highlight mutations.

The deleteHighlight invalidation test only pre-caches grouped highlights and does not pre-cache/re-check per-video highlights, so it misses the stale-cache regression in /api/videos/{videoId}/highlights.

summary: Review failed due to a blocking cache invalidation bug: deleting a highlight does not invalidate cached per-video highlight lists. Diff and transcript skeleton were reviewed; no additional shared-state gaps were identified.
